install.windows_download: Open https://claude.com/download in the browser to download the official installer (.exe). Default save location: %USERPROFILE%\Downloads.
install.macos_download: Open https://claude.com/download in the browser to download the official installer (.dmg). Default save location: ~/Downloads.
install.linux: Not supported. Claude Desktop is Windows / macOS only.
install.note: This is a GUI desktop application — installation completes through a graphical wizard. Always tell the user the download location and ask them to double-click the installer and follow the wizard (Next → Next → Install).

install_flow.summary: Download installer → user double-clicks → user clicks through the install wizard
agent_steps: Windows: prefer `winget install --id Anthropic.Claude` if winget is available — it handles download and install silently. Fall back to manual download if winget is missing.
macOS / Windows manual: download the installer to the user's Downloads folder using `Invoke-WebRequest` (Windows) or `curl -L -o` (macOS).
After download finishes, tell the user the EXACT file path (e.g. 'Saved to ~/Downloads/Claude-Setup.exe').
Open the installer for the user (`Start-Process` on Windows, `open` on macOS).
Tell the user: '安装向导已打开,请按照向导点击下一步完成安装。' / 'The installer is open — please follow the wizard to finish.'
Do NOT try to automate the GUI wizard.
tell_user: That the installer was opened automatically
That they should click through the wizard themselves

blocked_regions.zh-CN: claude.com may be blocked in mainland China — a VPN/proxy is usually required.
